languages.original_text: "On the contrary, Mistress Heydari. I know all too well the fear of a predatory past dogging my steps, and the desire to flee until the ground itself runs out beneath my feet. I do not care in what guise you appear before me, for you retain your keen mind and sharp tongue."

languages.text: "Наоборот, госпожа Хейдари. Мне хорошо знаком страх хищного прошлого преследующего по пятам, и желание бежать, пока не кончится земля под ногами. Меня не волнует какой личиной вы предстаете передо мной — ведь ваш живой ум и острый язык все еще при вас".

"On the contrary, Mistress Heydari. I know all too well the fear of a predatory past dogging my steps, and the desire to flee until the ground itself runs out beneath my feet. I do not care in what guise you appear before me, for you retain your keen mind and sharp tongue."
languages.original_text: "Наоборот, госпожа Хейдари. Мне хорошо знаком страх хищного прошлого преследующего по пятам, и желание бежать, пока не кончится земля под ногами. Меня не волнует какой личиной вы предстаете передо мной — ведь ваш живой ум и острый язык все еще при вас".

traits.locale_text: "On the contrary, Mistress Heydari. I know all too well the fear of a predatory past dogging my steps, and the desire to flee until the ground itself runs out beneath my feet. I do not care in what guise you appear before me, for you retain your keen mind and sharp tongue."

"On the contrary, Mistress Heydari. I know all too well the fear of a predatory past dogging my steps, and the desire to flee until the ground itself runs out beneath my feet. I do not care in what guise you appear before me, for you retain your keen mind and sharp tongue."

"On the contrary, Mistress Heydari. I know all too well the fear of a predatory past dogging my steps, and the desire to flee until the ground itself runs out beneath my feet. I do not care in what guise you appear before me, for you retain your keen mind and sharp tongue."

languages.text: «Se equivoca, señora Heydari. Conozco perfectamente el miedo a que un pasado depredador me pise los talones y el ansia de huir hasta que no quede suelo bajo mis pies. No me importa el aspecto que presente, ya que su aguda mente y su afilada lengua siguen siendo las mismas».
languages.original_text: "On the contrary, Mistress Heydari. I know all too well the fear of a predatory past dogging my steps, and the desire to flee until the ground itself runs out beneath my feet. I do not care in what guise you appear before me, for you retain your keen mind and sharp tongue."

traits.locale_text: «Se equivoca, señora Heydari. Conozco perfectamente el miedo a que un pasado depredador me pise los talones y el ansia de huir hasta que no quede suelo bajo mis pies. No me importa el aspecto que presente, ya que su aguda mente y su afilada lengua siguen siendo las mismas».

languages.text: 「とんでもない、ヘイダリ女史。獲物を追う捕食者のごとき過去が己の足跡につきまとう恐怖も、足元の地面が尽きるまで逃げ出したいという衝動も、私は痛いほどよく知っています。あなたがどのような姿で私の前に現れようと、私は気にしません。あなたはその鋭い知性と舌鋒を保っているのですから」
languages.original_text: "On the contrary, Mistress Heydari. I know all too well the fear of a predatory past dogging my steps, and the desire to flee until the ground itself runs out beneath my feet. I do not care in what guise you appear before me, for you retain your keen mind and sharp tongue."

traits.locale_text: 「とんでもない、ヘイダリ女史。獲物を追う捕食者のごとき過去が己の足跡につきまとう恐怖も、足元の地面が尽きるまで逃げ出したいという衝動も、私は痛いほどよく知っています。あなたがどのような姿で私の前に現れようと、私は気にしません。あなたはその鋭い知性と舌鋒を保っているのですから」

languages.text: “恰恰相反，海达利女士。我太了解那种被贪婪的过去死死咬住不放的恐惧，以及想要逃到大地尽头的冲动了。我不在乎你以何种面目出现在我面前，因为你依然保有那敏锐的头脑与犀利的谈吐。”
languages.original_text: "On the contrary, Mistress Heydari. I know all too well the fear of a predatory past dogging my steps, and the desire to flee until the ground itself runs out beneath my feet. I do not care in what guise you appear before me, for you retain your keen mind and sharp tongue."

traits.locale_text: “恰恰相反，海达利女士。我太了解那种被贪婪的过去死死咬住不放的恐惧，以及想要逃到大地尽头的冲动了。我不在乎你以何种面目出现在我面前，因为你依然保有那敏锐的头脑与犀利的谈吐。”

languages.text: "Im Gegenteil, Meisterin Heydari. Ich weiß nur allzu gut, dass mir die Angst vor einer räuberischen Vergangenheit folgt und mir der Wunsch, die Flucht zu ergreifen unter den Füßen brennt. Mit ist egal, in welcher Gestalt Ihr vor mir erscheint, denn Euer scharfer Verstand und Eure spitze Zungen bleiben."
languages.original_text: "On the contrary, Mistress Heydari. I know all too well the fear of a predatory past dogging my steps, and the desire to flee until the ground itself runs out beneath my feet. I do not care in what guise you appear before me, for you retain your keen mind and sharp tongue."

traits.locale_text: "Im Gegenteil, Meisterin Heydari. Ich weiß nur allzu gut, dass mir die Angst vor einer räuberischen Vergangenheit folgt und mir der Wunsch, die Flucht zu ergreifen unter den Füßen brennt. Mit ist egal, in welcher Gestalt Ihr vor mir erscheint, denn Euer scharfer Verstand und Eure spitze Zungen bleiben."

languages.text: « Au contraire, maîtresse Heydari. Je ne connais que trop bien la peur d'un passé dévorant qui me rattrape à chaque pas, et le désir de fuir jusqu'à ce que le sol se dérobe sous mes pieds. Peu importe la forme sous laquelle vous m'apparaissez, car vous conservez votre esprit vif et votre langue habile. »
languages.original_text: "On the contrary, Mistress Heydari. I know all too well the fear of a predatory past dogging my steps, and the desire to flee until the ground itself runs out beneath my feet. I do not care in what guise you appear before me, for you retain your keen mind and sharp tongue."

traits.locale_text: « Au contraire, maîtresse Heydari. Je ne connais que trop bien la peur d'un passé dévorant qui me rattrape à chaque pas, et le désir de fuir jusqu'à ce que le sol se dérobe sous mes pieds. Peu importe la forme sous laquelle vous m'apparaissez, car vous conservez votre esprit vif et votre langue habile. »

languages.text: "Tam tersi Üstat Heydari. Peşimden ayrılmayan yırtıcı bir geçmişin korkusunu ve ayaklarımın altındaki yer tükenene kadar kaçma arzusunu çok iyi bilirim. Karşıma hangi kılıkta çıktığınız umurumda değil, zira keskin zihninizi ve sivri dilinizi koruyorsunuz."
languages.original_text: "On the contrary, Mistress Heydari. I know all too well the fear of a predatory past dogging my steps, and the desire to flee until the ground itself runs out beneath my feet. I do not care in what guise you appear before me, for you retain your keen mind and sharp tongue."

traits.locale_text: "Tam tersi Üstat Heydari. Peşimden ayrılmayan yırtıcı bir geçmişin korkusunu ve ayaklarımın altındaki yer tükenene kadar kaçma arzusunu çok iyi bilirim. Karşıma hangi kılıkta çıktığınız umurumda değil, zira keskin zihninizi ve sivri dilinizi koruyorsunuz."
